name: algorithmic-research-loop
description: Autonomous algorithmic R&D laboratory — explores known solutions, invents new approaches, implements with TDD, benchmarks, validates complexity, and produces ranked innovation reports. Powered by 16 specialized AI agents.

plugins.name: algorithmic-research-loop
plugins.description: Autonomous algorithmic R&D pipeline with 7-phase pipeline, 16 specialized agents, quality gates, hard blocks, and loop-back mechanism for innovation cycles. Give it a problem, walk away, come back to working implementations with benchmarks.
